name: octopus
description: Local Ollama model lab — chat with live telemetry

scripts.validate: npm run validate:frontend && npm run validate:backend && npm run validate:patterns
scripts.fix: cd frontend && npm run lint:fix && npm run lint:css:fix && npm run format && cd ../backend && ./.venv/bin/ruff check --fix . && ./.venv/bin/ruff format .
